summary: Original public walkthrough for runx (runx.ai), published as a durable public repo, explaining skill structure, the local harness proof gate (runx 0.6.14), and the registry-publish trap. Links runx.ai and github.com/runxhq/runx, and stars the upstream repo for discovery. Goodwill support action for bounty #49.

observations.description: Field walkthrough documenting how to author a runx skill, prove it with `runx harness`, valid expect.status values (sealed|failure|needs_agent|policy_denied|escalated), and the local-vs-remote publish pitfall. Useful to a reader evaluating runx.
Starred the upstream runx repo so more developers discover the project. Authenticated GitHub star (HTTP 204).
Durable public repo hosting the walkthrough (README) and this evidence file, reachable by a stranger.
